_comment: This is an example for a FragilityModel object. The reference field links to a Reference (by reference_id) and combines with model_id to form the unique fragility_model_id (e.g., 'Smith-2020|fra1001'). Component relationships are managed through component_fragility_model_bridge.json. edp_metric and edp_unit are required.
comp_description: Component level - Tee joint - Black Iron with Threaded Joints - Pipe size 6 inches, 40 psi
